zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Walwayne於1168年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾時，他的父親Sir John de Walwayne33歲，母親Mrs. John de Walwayne27歲。他和Leonard Hackluyt至少有1個兒子。他去世於1230年在英國威爾斯享年62歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Walwayne was born in 1168, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John de Walwayne, was 33 and his mother, Mrs. John de Walwayne, was 27. He had at least 1 son with Leonard Hackluyt. He died in 1230, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Walwayne est né en 1168, à Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Walwayne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John de Walwayne, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Leonard Hackluyt. Il est décédé en 1230, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Walwayne(이)가 1168년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Walwayne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John de Walwayne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Leonard Hackluyt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 영국 웨일스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Walwayne родился в 1168 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John de Walwayne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John de Walwayne, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Leonard Hackluyt. Он умер в 1230 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
